//: MCP servers passed to the brain via `claude -p --mcp-config`. Empty by default → the bot runs chat + news with ZERO setup (easy plug-and-play). Gmail/Calendar are an OPT-IN add-on: copy config/mcp.local.example.json to config/mcp.local.json (gitignored) and follow README §Gmail/Calendar. A local override, if present, wins over this file.
